system.descriptor: Pilot covers the operation of aircraft and spacecraft. Each specialisation is a separate skill.
system.uses:
Uses: Flying aircraft, piloting spacecraft, performing aerial manoeuvres, landing in difficult conditions.
Personal: Jump packs, grav-chutes, and similar personal flight devices.
Military Craft: Atmospheric military vehicles including Thunderhawks, Valkyries, and similar assault craft.
Spacecraft: Void-capable vessels from system runners to warp-capable ships.
Flyers: Civilian and light atmospheric craft.
Specialisations: Personal, Military Craft, Spacecraft, Flyers. Each specialisation must be taken separately as a distinct skill.

description.value:
Pilot covers the operation of aircraft and spacecraft. Each specialisation is a separate skill.

Specialisations: Personal, Military Craft, Spacecraft, Flyers

In Deathwatch, Pilot is a separate skill from Drive, unlike Dark Heresy 2e where both are folded into Operate.
